round1_findings_resolved: SSE idle persist wired via onIdlePosted; decision not persisted; guards channel-scoped; additive mirror under lock.
blocking_issues: cancel-on-prune cross-dispatcher TOCTOU: after afterPrune snapshot, the SSE bridge can re-claim+complete+addPostedIdle the same key (gen B); the poller's stale deferred removePostedIdle deletes B's mirror and cancel() cancels B's fresh shade -> reintroduces regeneration + missed alert.
non_blocking_issues: remove/add no-retry on throw; cancel uses key.hashCode() not channel; tests don't cover prune-vs-SSE interleaving.
notes: Round-1 blocker fixed; Bug-2 still logic-neutral; but post-prune cancel/remove not generation-fenced across the dispatcher boundary.
